summary: Balanced matrix mix captures a crystal‑clear sound while the July 1990 show dazzles with a smoking Jack Straw opener, Picasso Moon and a soaring playin’ jam.
review: Both reviewers award five stars, lauding the post‑production work that leaves the mix bright and well‑balanced. The performance is described as tight and heavenly, with highlights including the Jack Straw opener, Picasso Moon and an inspired jam segment, making this show stand out on a tour noted for high quality playing.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently perfect scores and enthusiastic comments indicate an exceptional performance and excellent matrix recording, though only two detailed reviews limit confidence to medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced post‑production mix praised for full high‑end response; no reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set list may look modest on paper, but the tight playing and soaring jams make the overall flow feel heavenly and tightly cohesive.
